risk_notes: Hardcoded default admin token 'admin-secret' embedded in app.py config — credential in source code.
No requirements.txt / pyproject.toml shown; Flask dependency is unpinned and resolution is implicit.
Reference to 'click.echo' in init_db_command without importing click — runtime error risk, not a supply-chain dep, but indicates missing declared dependency (click, normally transitively from Flask).
TOKENS map stored in plaintext app config — secrets management concern.
